# Add household model and permissions

## Summary

Implement a household-aware ownership and permission model so data can be private, shared, or read-only where needed.

## Why

Private administration often extends beyond one person to partners, households, and shared responsibilities.

## Scope

- define private versus shared ownership
- define read and write access concepts
- define how contracts, inventory, and finance records behave in shared contexts
- define household-aware dashboards and visibility rules

## Acceptance Criteria

- ownership modes are documented
- permission concepts are explicit
- shared versus private behavior is defined for key records
- the output supports later implementation for multi-person usage
